data.title: 国际服卡池复刻「RABBIT 1, Prepare to Move out.」&「RABBIT 2, We'll stop the enemies, no matter what!」&「This is the camp RABBIT. As long as only one thing is on fire, we'll be fine.」

[Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]
